instinct_candidates.title: Close Loom tickets, don't delete files
instinct_candidates.trigger: When cleaning up or finishing work tracked under `.loom/ticket/`
instinct_candidates.action: Preserve history by closing the ticket (or moving it into `.loom/ticket/closed/`) instead of deleting the markdown file directly; only remove a ticket file if it was created by mistake and contains no useful record.

instinct_candidates.title: New CLI nouns must ship with docs + help polish
instinct_candidates.trigger: When adding or expanding a `loom <noun>` CLI surface (new module, new commands, new flags)
instinct_candidates.action: Update the noun-level README (or equivalent) with 2-5 concrete usage examples; sanity-check `loom <noun> --help` for clarity and flag naming; add or update CLI UX regression tests when behavior is user-visible.

instinct_candidates.title: Run uv-based gates before calling work done
instinct_candidates.trigger: After implementing user-visible CLI changes (even small ones)
instinct_candidates.action: Run `uv run ruff check .`, then `uv run basedpyright`, then `uv run pytest`; fix all warnings/errors (no waivers) before considering the change complete.
